cobolLens.copyFolders.description: Folders to search for copybooks (relative to the workspace root)
cobolLens.copyExtensions.description: Extensions to try when resolving copybooks (empty string = no extension)
cobolLens.ignoredCopybooks.description: List of copybooks to exclude from the blocking diagnostic on unresolved COPY statements
cobolLens.language.description: Language for linter diagnostic messages (auto = detect from VS Code locale)
cobolLens.language.auto: Detect from VS Code display language
cobolLens.ifBlockHighlight.enabled.descr: Highlight IF/ELSE/END-IF blocks with different colors per nesting level
cobolLens.ifBlockHighlight.scopeBars.des: Show colored side bars to indicate the scope of each IF block
cobolLens.linter.onType.description: Run the linter in real time while typing (if false, only on save)
cobolLens.linter.delay.description: Delay in milliseconds before running the linter after a change
cobolLens.linter.rules.no-goto.enabled.d: Do not use GOTO, prefer PERFORM and IF
cobolLens.linter.rules.no-at-end.enabled: Do not use AT END / NOT AT END, use the file status with EVALUATE
cobolLens.linter.rules.no-level-77-78.en: Do not use levels 77 and 78 in WORKING-STORAGE
cobolLens.linter.rules.division-separato: Each DIVISION/SECTION must be preceded by the separator line
cobolLens.linter.rules.pic-alignment.ena: The PIC definition must start at position 45
cobolLens.linter.rules.select-col12.enab: SELECT in FILE-CONTROL must start at column 12
cobolLens.linter.rules.assign-col29.enab: ASSIGN TO, ORGANIZATION, etc. must start at column 29
Paragraphs must follow the I0001-/E0001-/F0001-/V0000-/S0000- convention
cobolLens.linter.rules.no-else-if.enable: Do not use ELSE IF, indent the IF inside an ELSE
cobolLens.linter.rules.move-to-alignment: In the MOVE...TO statement, the word TO must start at position 45
There must be exactly 1 space between the level and the variable name
cobolLens.linter.rules.end-structure.ena: Each IF/PERFORM/EVALUATE must have the corresponding END- closure
cobolLens.linter.rules.undefined-variabl: Verify that used variables are defined in the program or in the copybooks
cobolLens.linter.rules.undefined-paragra: Verify that each PERFORM refers to a defined paragraph
Report paragraphs that are defined but never called
cobolLens.linter.rules.unused-variable.e: Report variables defined in WORKING-STORAGE but never used
cobolLens.linter.rules.duplicate-variabl: Verify that no variables are defined more than once
cobolLens.linter.rules.missing-period.en: Verify that variable definitions end with a period
cobolLens.linter.rules.pic-missing.enabl: Verify that elementary variables have the PIC clause
cobolLens.linter.rules.mismatched-copy.e: Verify that COPY statements refer to existing files
cobolLens.linter.rules.perform-thru-orde: Verify that in PERFORM X THRU Y, Y is defined after X
cobolLens.linter.rules.section-order.ena: Verify that the DIVISIONs are in the required order
cobolLens.linter.rules.empty-paragraph.e: Report empty paragraphs or paragraphs that only contain EXIT/CONTINUE
cobolLens.linter.rules.consecutive-perfo: Verify that there is a blank line between two consecutive PERFORMs
cobolLens.linter.rules.missing-file-stat: Verify that each SELECT has a STATUS clause
Verify that the program contains STOP RUN or GOBACK
cobolLens.linter.rules.and-or-if.enabled: Report a spurious IF after AND/OR in a compound condition
cobolLens.linter.rules.redefines-size.en: Verify that REDEFINES has the same size as the original element
Verify that column 7 contains only valid indicator characters (space, *, /, D, -, $)
cobolLens.linter.rules.unsubscripted-occ: Report variables with OCCURS used without an index or subscript
cobolLens.linter.rules.orphan-scope-deli: Report END-IF/END-PERFORM/END-EVALUATE without the corresponding opening statement
cobolLens.linter.rules.variable-name-len: The variable name must not exceed 30 characters (Micro Focus COBOL limit)
cobolLens.linter.rules.missing-level.ena: Variable in the DATA DIVISION declared without a level number
cobolLens.linter.rules.chars-after-perio: Invalid content after the terminator period of a COBOL statement
cobolLens.linter.rules.compute-multiline: Multiline COMPUTE with a line ending in '*': the CICS precompiler may generate errors
cobolLens.linter.rules.alphanumeric-in-c: Alphanumeric variable used in a math statement (COMPUTE/ADD/SUBTRACT/MULTIPLY/DIVIDE)
cobolLens.linter.rules.move-alphanumeric: Alphanumeric value (literal, figurative constant or alphanumeric variable) moved into a numeric variable; FUNCTION NUMVAL is excluded
